meaning: n.角化过度(症),眼角膜细胞增多
examples: Too few proteins lead to night blindness, perifollicular hyperkeratosis, xerophthalmia, increased morbidity and mortality in young children.
Pathological changes of condyloma are characterized as proliferation, especially dysplasia, hyperkeratosis and parakeratosis.
The main manifestation was hypopigment, hyperpigment, and palmoplantar Hyperkeratosis. Triad cases happened in 72 patients (7.35%).
